title: Classic British Beef Roast
description: A traditional British-inspired roast beef dish with a delicious, savory flavor. This recipe is perfect for a Sunday dinner or special occasion.

ingredients.name: Beef roast (3-4 pounds)
ingredients.notes: Choose a high-quality roast with good marbling

instructions: Season the beef roast with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the roast until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast the beef for 15 minutes per pound, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
Baste the roast with beef broth every 30 minutes.
Remove the roast from the oven and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing.
Serve the roast with your choice of sides, such as roasted vegetables or a salad.
